questionText: If flaring is relevant to your oil and gas production and processing activities, describe your organization's efforts to reduce flaring, including any flaring reduction targets.
questionKo: flaring is relevant to your oil 및 gas production 및 프로세스ing activities, 설명 귀사의 efforts to reduce flaring인 경우, including any flaring reduction 목표.
simpleHelp: Flaring of gas contributes to climate change and impacts the environment through emissions of CO2 and other pollutants while wasting a valuable energy resource, hence investors are interested in learning about organizations' efforts to reduce flaring.

columns.text: Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities
options: Yes, both non-emergency and emergency flaring
No, we do not use flaring
columns.textKo: Occurrence of flaring in production 및/또는 프로세스ing activities
optionsKo: Yes, both non-emergency 및 emergency flaring
No, we do not use flaring

options: No flaring targets have been set
optionsKo: No flaring 목표 have been set

columns.text: Involvement in voluntary flaring reduction programs
options: World Bank Zero Routine Flaring by 2030
columns.textKo: Involvement in voluntary flaring reduction programs
optionsKo: World Bank Zero Routine Flaring by 2030

columns.text: Primary reason for not setting flaring reduction targets
options: Important but not an immediate business priority
Judged to be unimportant, explanation provided
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 for not setting flaring reduction 목표
optionsKo: Important but not an immediate business priority
Judged to be unimportant, explanation 입력

guidance.text:
General 
Flaring can occur in the coal industry for many reasons, ranging from initial start-up testing of a facility to unplanned equipment malfunctions.
Flaring includes emissions of CO2, CH4, and N2O from elevated flares, ground flares, emergency flares, well-testing and well work-over.
Please explain (column 6) 
If you select "No, we do not use flaring" or "Yes, only emergency flaring" in column 1, give further details confirming no use of non-emergency (also known as ‘routine') flaring in this column.
If you select "No flaring targets have been set" in column 2, give further organization-specific details on the reasons in this column.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Flaring can occur in the coal industry for many reasons, ranging from initial start-up testing of a facility to unplanned equipment malfunctions. Flaring includes emissions of CO2, CH4, 및 N2O from elevated flares, ground flares, emergency flares, well-testing 및 well work-over. Please explain (열 6) 만약 you select "No, we do not use flaring" 또는 "Yes, only emergency flaring" in 열 1, give further details confirming no use of non-emergency (also known as ‘routine') flaring in this 열. 만약 you select "No flaring 목표 have been set" in 열 2, give further organization-specific details on the reasons in this 열.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Yes, both non-emergency and emergency flaring' selected in column 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' AND any option excluding 'No…' selected in column ‘Efforts to reduce flaring' AND any option excluding 'No…' selected in column 'Involvement in voluntary flaring reduction programmes' - 1/1 points
A maximum of 1/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Yes, emergency flaring only' selected in column 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' - 1/1 points
A maximum of 1/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No, we do not use flaring' selected in column 'Occurrence of flaring in production and/or processing activities' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 'Yes, both non-emergency 및 emergency flaring' 선택 in 열 'Occurrence of flaring in production 및/또는 프로세스ing activities' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'No…' 선택 in 열 ‘Efforts to reduce flaring' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'No…' 선택 in 열 'Involvement in voluntary flaring reduction programmes' - 1/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'Yes, emergency flaring only' 선택 in 열 'Occurrence of flaring in production 및/또는 프로세스ing activities' - 1/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 C) 'No, we do not use flaring' 선택 in 열 'Occurrence of flaring in production 및/또는 프로세스ing activities' - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

CC Oil and gas Management • Routes have been added to account for the different types of flaring. Scoring has been adapted to changes in the question structure.
